title: Overview - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > About us > Overview

## 60 Years of Growth: A Legacy of Excellence
For over 60 years, Green & Spiegel has been recognized as a leading immigration law firm in Canada. What began as a practice focused on individual immigration applications evolved into a full-service platform supporting a broad range of clients, including corporations navigating complex global mobility and compliance matters. In 2012, the firm expanded into the United States, marking a significant milestone in its growth. Today, Green & Spiegel is widely regarded as a premier North American immigration law firm and the gold standard for corporations and individuals seeking comprehensive, immigration solutions for both the United States and Canada.

## 1962: Green & Spiegel Founded
In 1962 , Mendel Green established Green & Spiegel in Toronto, Canada, at a time when immigration options were limited and legal representation was scarce. Green & Spiegel became one of the first firms in Canada to advocate for immigrants, helping families and individuals navigate complex immigration systems.

## 1990s: U.S. Expansion Begins

## 2012: Green & Spiegel U.S. Established

## 2015-present: Continued Growth

## A Legacy That Continues.

## North America’s trusted partner in immigration law, providing innovative
and strategic solutions to get the work done
Established in 1962, Green and Spiegel stands as one of North America’s most exclusive, seasoned and extensive immigration law firms, boasting over six decades of serving a varied international clientele. With a dedicated team of over 230 individuals, including over 50 attorneys focused on Canadian and U.S. immigration law, Green and Spiegel is widely regarded as the foremost authority in the field for businesses with immigration needs in North America. With an unparalleled depth and breadth of expertise on both sides of the Canada/U.S. border, Green and Spiegel is uniquely situated to provide the full range of Canadian and U.S. immigration services:
Strategic advice and supportive processing of all types of immigration applications
A comprehensive immigration strategy to transition individuals to permanent status
High level of expertise for all corporate immigration matters regardless of the size of the business or the complexity of the immigration matter.
